title: Croatian Risotto Gratin Keto Bake
description: A rich, creamy, and cheesy keto dish that combines the flavors of Croatian cuisine with the comfort of a gratin.

ingredients.name: Gratin cheese (such as Parmesan or Cheddar)
Xanthan gum (optional)
ingredients.notes: To prevent the sauce from separating

instructions: Cook the risotto rice according to the package instructions until it's al dente.
In a separate pan, melt the butter and sauté the garlic until fragrant.
Add the fermented sausage to the pan and cook until browned.
In a mixing bowl, combine the cooked risotto rice, cream cheese, and grated gratin cheese.
Add the cooked sausage mixture to the bowl and mix until well combined.
Add the xanthan gum (if using) to prevent the sauce from separating.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and top with additional gratin cheese.
Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the sauce is bubbly.
